data: Short, breezy questions in the spirit of a daily mini puzzle. Built for warming up.
Tropical orange-fleshed stone fruit, five letters:
Mango — five letters, fits the clue.
Largest planet in our solar system:
Jupiter is the largest, with a mass greater than all other planets combined.
Number of sides on a hexagon:
Hex- = six. Octagon has eight, pentagon has five.
Which of these is a primary color?
The three primary colors of light are red, green, and blue; in paint they are red, yellow, and blue. Yellow is the only primary in this list.
Rhode Island is about 1,545 square miles.
The yen has been Japan's currency since 1871.
Tallest mountain on Earth, measured from sea level:
Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Australia, Europe, North America, and South America.
From the 1992 inaugural season to today — how well do you know the EPL?
Who is the Premier League's all-time top scorer?
Alan Shearer scored 260 Premier League goals, mostly with Newcastle United.
Which club won the inaugural Premier League title in the 1992–93 season?
Manchester United, managed by Sir Alex Ferguson, won the first ever Premier League.
Erling Haaland joined Manchester City in 2022 from which club?
Haaland transferred from Borussia Dortmund and won the Golden Boot in his first PL season.
Which stadium is home to Liverpool FC?
Anfield has been Liverpool's home since 1892.
Who has won the most Premier League Golden Boots?
Both Henry and Shearer are tied
Thierry Henry and Alan Shearer are tied on four Golden Boots each.
Salah captains the Egyptian national team.
Brighton & Hove Albion, named for their coastal home.
Which player holds the record for most Premier League appearances?
Gareth Barry made 653 PL appearances across Aston Villa, Manchester City, Everton, and West Brom.
Which manager led Leicester City to their fairytale 2015–16 title?
Claudio Ranieri's Leicester won the title at 5000-1 preseason odds.
What is the largest stadium currently used in the Premier League by capacity?
Which club won four Premier League titles in a row from 2020–21 to 2023–24?
Manchester City's four consecutive titles is a PL record.
Newcastle United play their home games at:
St James' Park has been Newcastle's home since 1892.
Who is Arsenal's all-time leading goal scorer in the Premier League era?
Thierry Henry is Arsenal's all-time top scorer with 228 goals across all competitions.
In what year was the Premier League founded?
The Premier League was founded in February 1992.
Which goalkeeper has the most Premier League clean sheets all-time?
Petr Čech finished his career with 202 PL clean sheets, a league record.
